concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出了10条一般假设和5条数值假设，每条假设都附有合理性论证，为模型简化提供依据。
concepts_used.source_excerpt:
1.2 Assumptions
General Assumptions:
1. People are reasonable and use the exit closest to their seat.
...
Numerical Assumptions:
11. People shuffle out of their seats at a constant velocity of 145 ft/min inside the car. As they move to the exit through the aisle of the train car, they walk at a constant velocity of 250 ft/min. Passengers also walk across the platform at 250 ft/min.

concepts_used.title: 排队论基础（M/M/1）
concepts_used.how_used: 将楼梯底部的人群聚集建模为排队系统，计算队列中每人占用4平方英尺空间，并推导队列中行走速度与楼梯容量和队列宽度的关系。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: To simulate this effect, we allowed a person waiting in the queue to take up about 4 sq ft of space and calculated a new reduced walking speed for people standing in the queue.

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 通过线性关系计算乘客从座位到车门的时间，以及从车门到队列的时间，建立总时间与列车长度、车厢数等变量的函数。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We began by obtaining the rate at which people arrive at the queue by finding the amount of time it takes the average passenger to leave the train car. Then, we calculated the distance traveled in the queue and the distance traveled on the platform.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过改变车厢行数（d）和车厢数（n）观察对总时间的影响，发现队列形成阈值（d>19行）并给出优化建议。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Using the functions we developed, we found that a queue around the bottom of the stairway would only collect when the train cars had more than 19 rows.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用曲面图（surface plot）展示单列火车情况下时间与车厢行数、车厢数的三维关系，直观呈现优化结果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Surface plot for one fully occupied train

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分清晰阐述了问题背景（火车站拥堵）、研究目标（优化出站时间）和论文结构概述。
concepts_used.source_excerpt:
1 Introduction and General Interpretation
Congestion in train stations is a major issue for large cities. Thus, optimizing the time for a commuter to travel from their seat in the train car to the exit of the station is crucial to maintain a steady pedestrian flow and maintain efficiency within the station.

concepts_used.title: 模型评价的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 在模型分析部分（Section 6）讨论了模型局限性，如假设的合理性、参数取值的依据，并给出非技术性信件总结。
